name: Excavator Ball
short_description: The tower lights have gone out! Explore a city full of puzzles and challenges with an excavator.
detailed_description:
Excavator Ball is a 3D video game where you must overcome various puzzles and challenges with an excavator in a city.

GAMEPLAY

Overcome all obstacles in the shortest time possible to unlock several rewards.

STORY

One day, something mysterious happens in the city: the tower lights go out without warning! This tower is the heart of the city, and its lights symbolize balance and peace. When the boss learns about the blackout, he gets furious and decides there will be no rest until the lights are restored. With his anger unleashed, the player is forced to take control of the excavator and face a series of puzzles and challenges blocking the way.

FEATURES

⭐ Face a variety of puzzles and challenges as you explore the city, using your excavator to overcome each obstacle.

⭐ Control a powerful excavator and use its tools to solve puzzles creatively.

⭐ Complete challenges in the shortest time possible to unlock rewards and improve your skills.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Dutch, Indonesian, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Arabic
